description: RANDEV telemetry decode regression: a real CRC-OK off-air frame (captured from a SkyRoof recording via the headless StreamingPipeline decoder) pinned to a few expected fields. Guards the ksy->JSON converter output (tools/ksy_to_json.py -> Telemetry/Definitions/52898_RANDEV.json) + the schema-v2 TelemetryParser (computed zero-width instance fields + ternary expr) against drift. The pinned fields prove: the 15-byte AX.25 header skip (system_leading = the 0xF0 PID byte the ksy folds into the payload), a simple kaitai-instance calibration (temps, eps voltage), and the ternary EPS battery-current path.
